SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFF EMILY REAGAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS SCOTT MERCER AND MADELINE THIES ARE PRESENT. MADELINE THIES WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,650.00 FILED BY REAGAN, EMILY AS TO DEFENDANT MERCER, SCOTT THIES, MADELINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REAGAN, EMILY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERCER, SCOTT THIES, MADELINE $1,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,805.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
